description.en: Developed as a conceptual study during my Master’s in UX Design, this project challenged us to envision a sustainable smartphone ecosystem—spanning UI/UX, marketing strategy, and physical touchpoints. My part in this proejct was to develop the general concept and designing the packaging experience. My goal was to translate our core brand philosophy into a tactile reality, using Blender to create high-fidelity 3D renders that highlight a minimalist, eco-conscious aesthetic.
description.de: Developed as a conceptual study during my Master’s in UX Design, this project challenged us to envision a sustainable smartphone ecosystem—spanning UI/UX, marketing strategy, and physical touchpoints. I led the general concept development and headed the packaging experience. My goal was to translate our core brand philosophy into a tactile reality, using Blender to create high-fidelity 3D renders that highlight a minimalist, eco-conscious aesthetic.

caption.en: Some of the renders I created of the packaging using Blender.
